name: 03B1_cone_warning
prompt:
First-person walking perspective at chest height approaching a hazard-marked section of park path. The asphalt path ahead leads toward a section marked with orange traffic cones placed at intervals across the path width.

The cones become more distinct as the camera approaches. Standing water is visible just beyond the cone line. One cone has fallen on its side in the water. The cones form a clear visual barrier indicating the edge of the flooding ahead.

Two upright orange traffic cones dominate the center of the frame, marking the boundary of the flooded zone. Dark standing water is visible beyond and between them. The path surface transitions from damp asphalt to submerged pavement at the cone line.
negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
